examples: Inspector Banbury came up to see her, but she sent him away.
Tom Banbury was preoccupied with the missing Shepherd child and did not want to devote time to the new murder.
This Dutch barn near Banbury was set alight last September.
Banbury Civic Society said it should stay as it was a gift to the town.
Kevin Lavelle, 29, died following a fight outside the Cricketer's Pub in Banbury in June 2004.
